updatedContent
originalContent

originalContent
option.value:
package org.acoustixaudio.opiqo.latencytester.ui.theme
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
val Purple80 = Color(0xFFD0BCFF) val PurpleGrey80 = Color(0xFFCCC2DC) val Pink80 = Color(0xFFEFB8C8)
val Purple40 = Color(0xFF6650a4) val PurpleGrey40 = Color(0xFF625b71) val Pink40 = Color(0xFF7D5260)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
package org.acoustixaudio.opiqo.latencytester.ui.theme
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
val Purple80 = Color(0xFFD0BCFF) val PurpleGrey80 = Color(0xFFCCC2DC) val Pink80 = Color(0xFFEFB8C8)
val Purple40 = Color(0xFF6650a4) val PurpleGrey40 = Color(0xFF625b71) val Pink40 = Color(0xFF7D5260)
// Success / Warning theme colors val Success40 = Color(0xFF2E7D32) // green (light) val Success80 = Color(0xFF66BB6A) // lighter green val Warning40 = Color(0xFFF9A825) // amber (light) val Warning80 = Color(0xFFFFD54F) // lighter amber

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
